gyms.story_milestone: Defeated Brock and earned the Boulder Badge!
Defeated Misty and earned the Cascade Badge!
Defeated Lt. Surge and earned the Thunder Badge!
Defeated Erika and earned the Rainbow Badge!
Defeated Koga and earned the Soul Badge!
Defeated Sabrina and earned the Marsh Badge!
Defeated Blaine and earned the Volcano Badge!
Defeated Giovanni and earned the Earth Badge!

elite_four.story_milestone: Defeated Lorelei of the Elite Four!
Defeated Bruno of the Elite Four!
Defeated Agatha of the Elite Four!
Defeated Lance of the Elite Four!
Became the Pokémon Champion of Kanto! ⚡🏆
elite_four.note: Rematch levels are higher. Team varies based on your starter choice.

npc_trades.note: Trade your Abra for a Mr. Mime in the gatehouse on Route 2

key_items.name: dome-fossil
key_items.label: Dome Fossil
key_items.from: Defeat Super Nerd Miguel on B2F of Mt. Moon
key_items.note: Choice between Dome Fossil (Kabuto) or Helix Fossil (Omanyte) — pick one only!

key_items.name: helix-fossil
key_items.label: Helix Fossil
key_items.from: Defeat Super Nerd Miguel on B2F of Mt. Moon
key_items.note: Choice between Helix Fossil (Omanyte) or Dome Fossil (Kabuto) — pick one only!

npc_trades.note: Trade your Nidoran♂ for a Nidoran♀ in the gatehouse on Route 5

key_items.name: super-rod
key_items.label: Super Rod
key_items.from: Fisherman in the house on Route 12
key_items.note: Allows fishing for rare high level Pokémon

safari-zone.label: Safari Zone

key_items.name: gold-teeth
key_items.label: Gold Teeth
key_items.from: Found on the ground in Area 3
key_items.note: Give to the Safari Zone Warden to receive HM Strength

safari-zone.note: Bzzt! Any area with Super Rod can yield Dratini (15%) or the extremely rare Dragonair (1%) Trainer-zzzt ⚡

interactables.name: articuno
interactables.note: Legendary — one encounter only. Save before approaching!

npc_trades.note: Trainer on Route 11 will trade their Nidorina for your Nidorino

key_items.name: itemfinder
key_items.label: Itemfinder
key_items.from: Professor Oak's aide in the Route 11 gate
key_items.note: Need 30 or more Pokémon registered in your Pokédex to receive this

interactables.name: snorlax
interactables.note: Blocking the road — wake with the Poké Flute. One time only!

npc_trades.note: Trainer on Route 18 will trade their Lickitung for your Golduck

key_items.name: ss-ticket
key_items.label: S.S. Ticket
key_items.from: Bill at his Sea Cottage on Route 25 after turning him back to normal
key_items.note: Required to board the S.S. Anne in Vermilion City

rock-tunnel.label: Rock Tunnel
rock-tunnel.note: Dark cave — Flash makes navigation easier

pokemon-tower.label: Pokémon Tower
pokemon-tower.note: Ghost types appear as undefined spirits without the Silph Scope

interactables.name: zapdos
interactables.note: Legendary — one encounter only. Save before approaching!

pokemon-mansion.label: Pokémon Mansion
pokemon-mansion.note: Ditto only appears in B1F — useful for breeding!

key_items.name: secret-key
key_items.label: Secret Key
key_items.note: Opens the locked door to the Cinnabar Island Gym

npc_trades.note: Trade your Poliwhirl for a Jynx inside a house in Cerulean City

key_items.name: powder-jar
key_items.label: Powder Jar
key_items.from: Old man in the house next to the Gym Badge man's house

npc_trades.note: Trader in Vermilion City will swap their Farfetch'd for your Spearow

key_items.name: bike-voucher
key_items.label: Bike Voucher
key_items.from: Chairman of the Pokémon Fan Club in Vermilion City
key_items.note: Exchange at Cerulean City Bike Shop for a free Bicycle

key_items.name: vs-seeker
key_items.label: VS. Seeker
key_items.from: Girl next to the counter in Vermilion City Pokémon Center

gift_pokemon.name: eevee

key_items.label: Coin Case

key_items.note: Required to play the Game Corner and redeem prizes

key_items.name: tea
key_items.label: Tea
key_items.note: Give to the Saffron City gate guards to gain access to Saffron City

key_items.name: silph-scope
key_items.label: Silph Scope

key_items.name: good-rod
key_items.label: Good Rod

key_items.label: Old Amber

key_items.label: Poké Flute
key_items.from: Mr. Fuji — given as thanks after saving him and Pokémon Tower from Team Rocket
key_items.note: Wakes the Snorlax blocking Routes 12 and 16

key_items.name: card-key
key_items.label: Card Key
key_items.note: Opens locked doors throughout Silph Co.
